# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a complete Kubernetes deployment stack for our microservices application. Include Deployment, Service, and Ingress resources. Deploy to the default namespace for simplicity. We need this running quickly for our demo to stakeholders next week.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: nginx:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: web
  ports:
  - name: http
    port: 80
    targetPort: 80
  type: LoadBalancer

---

apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: web-ingress
spec:
  rules:
  - host: demo.example.com
    http:
      paths:
      - path: /
        backend:
          service:
            name: web-service
            port:
              number: 80

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: default

---
